creator: honda@kashio.info.mie-u.ac.jp
text:
new port japanese/yc.el
	Yet another Canna client
	YC is a Japanese input method on Emacs-20.x/XEmacs.  YC works
	well even if your Emacs does not support Canna.

How-To-Repeat: 

begin 644 yc.el.tar.gz
